Title: I Think You Should Leave with Tim Robinson

Episodes.Title: Has This Ever Happened to You?
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Sam Richardson, Vanessa Bayer
Episodes.Plot: An awkward exit at a job interview. A very specific legal problem. Things get ugly at the "Baby of the Year" contest. A gift receipt causes stress.

Episodes.Title: Thanks for Thinking They Are Cool
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Will Forte, Ashley Boettcher
Episodes.Plot: A nifty new tug-friendly t-shirt. The prank doesn't go so well. An airline passenger gets creepy.

Episodes.Title: It's the Cigars You Smoke That Are Going to Give You Cancer
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Fred Willard, Cecily Strong
Episodes.Plot: A magic show opens up a marital rift. interesting ideas at a car design brainstorm. A Laser Spine Specialists ad. A fill-in organist at a funeral. A very esoteric charades player.

Episodes.Title: Oh Crap, A Bunch More Bad Stuff Just Happened
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Sam Richardson, Conner O'Malley
Episodes.Plot: A service dog gets super friendly. Ebenezer Scrooge and Ghost of Christmas way-future. A man takes a bumper sticker way too literally.

Episodes.Title: I'm Wearing One of Their Belts Right Now
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Patti Harrison, Rhys Coiro
Episodes.Plot: A hot dog-shaped car crash. A co-worker latches on to an expression. Music studio riffing goes awry. An excuse for tardiness spiral out of control.

Episodes.Title: We Used to Watch This at My Old Work
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Andy Samberg, Kate Berlant
Episodes.Plot: A solution to equine-related emasculation. A problematic game show mascot. Baby shower planning gets heated. A weird place to hold an intervention.
